chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3271 of 2017 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case 20.01.2025 Mr. Suleman Huda, advocate for respondent Mr. K.A. Vaswani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh This petition pertains to the deceased quota. Learned counsel for the respondent states that there is no policy of the respondent for consideration of deceased quota. He submits that the honourable Supreme Court has passed judgment in which all such indirect recourse has been deprecated. Learned counsel further states that judgment dated 26.09.2024 in the case of General Post Office Islamabad vs. Muhammad Jalal (Civil Petition No.3390 of 2021) it has also been reported that Rule 11-A of the Sindh Civil Servants (Appointment, Promotion & Transfer) Rules, 1974, has already been deleted by the Sindh Cabinet on 04.12.2024. It is also pointed out that notwithstanding the foregoing, there is no process under the NBP service rules for any son quota etc. In view hereof no case is made out. Petition is dismissed being misconceived. Judge Judge Amjad
